**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Paite Technology Development Co., Ltd. represents a classic case of an early-generation industrial manufacturer that has severely downsized, transitioning into a 'landlord' or dormant holding shell. Originally established in 2004 with a 5M RMB paid-in capital in the Tangshan Industrial Zone (Nanjing), its business scope is heavily focused on the production of electric vehicles (likely low-speed electric carts/scooters) and related mechanical parts. However, a glaring anomaly exists: the official registry classifies it under 'Diving Rescue and Other Unspecified Transport Equipment Manufacturing', which is completely disconnected from its actual EV scope. Furthermore, with only 1 insured employee in 2024 and the explicit inclusion of 'Own house leasing' at the end of its business scope, it is highly probable that its active manufacturing lines have ceased. It now survives primarily by leasing out its legacy factory buildings in the industrial park.
